entry.value: #foreach($req in $plan.requests) #if($req.operation == 'Create') $newline Create Account on application $req.resource#else $newline For $req.id in application $req.resource #end #if($req.items) $newline #foreach($item in $req.items) $!item.Operation $item.name:$item.value $newline #end #else $!req.Operation Account #end #end

#foreach($req in $plan.requests) #if($req.operation == 'Create') $newline Create Account on application $req.resource#else $newline For $req.id in application $req.resource #end #if($req.items) $newline #foreach($item in $req.items) $!item.Operation $item.name:$item.value $newline #end #else $!req.Operation Account #end #end
Create, Modify, Delete, Enable, Disable, Unlock, SetPassword
